Reorte

System / Location · First seen 3301-04-26 · 19 mentions
EDSM ↗ Inara ↗
Active: 3301-04-26 → 3311-12-02
System Overview

Reorte is a system in Elite Dangerous, significant from 3301-04-26 to 3311-12-02. Associated with Alliance, Sirius Corporation. Notable events include: The Reorte Mining Coalition succeeds in forcing Sirius Corporation to withdraw from the Reorte system.; The Reorte Pro-Alliance League's victory ensures Reorte remains within the Alliance.

System Data
Coordinates: [75.75, 48.75, 75.15625]
Allegiance: Alliance
Government: Cooperative
Controlling Faction: Alliance Rapid-reaction Corps
Security: Medium
Economy: Extraction
Population: 3.1B

Mentions Timeline (19 articles)
3311-12-02
Zorgon Peterson Unveils Caspian Explorer Vessel
Zorgon Peterson unveiled the Caspian Explorer, a dedicated large exploration vessel with a Mk II SCO FSD offering 500% neutron boost, and invited pilots to Reorte to field-test it by gathering exobiological data.
3311-05-16
Alliance Assembly Votes to End Sirius Defence Pact
The Alliance Assembly votes to end the strategic defence pact with Sirius Corporation, which was agreed in January 3308. Councilor Nakato Kaine's motion, seconded by Councilor Ainsley Niven of Reorte, passed by a slim majority despite Prime Minister Edmund Mahon's opposition.
3308-06-13
Alliance Divided over Anti-Xeno Pact
The Alliance Assembly is deadlocked over ratifying the strategic defence pact with Sirius Corporation, with Prime Minister Edmund Mahon advocating for military strength while Councillor Nakato Kaine warns against corporate infiltration.
3308-03-31
Reorte System Remains Allied
The Reorte Pro-Alliance League's victory ensures Reorte remains within the Alliance.
3308-03-25
Rival Initiatives to Decide Reorte’s Future
Rival delivery campaigns determine whether Reorte remains in the Alliance or seeks independence.
3308-03-18
Alliance Strives to Retain Reorte
The Alliance deploys the megaship Trobairitz to maintain Reorte's membership.
3308-03-14
Reorte Mining Coalition Proposes Independence
The Reorte Mining Coalition proposes independence from the Alliance over the Sirius defence pact.
3308-03-09
Trial Period Agreed for Alliance-Sirius Pact
The Alliance and Sirius Corporation agree to a three-month probationary period for their defence pact.
3308-02-25
Mahon Reprimanded over Reorte Conflict
The Alliance Assembly officially rebukes Prime Minister Edmund Mahon over the Reorte skirmish.
3308-02-08
Concerns Raised over Alliance-Sirius Pact
Sirius Corporation questions its Alliance defence partnership following the conflict in Reorte.
3308-02-03
Sirius Corporation Ejected from Reorte
The Reorte Mining Coalition succeeds in forcing Sirius Corporation to withdraw from the Reorte system.
3308-01-27
Conflict Erupts in the Reorte System
The Reorte Mining Coalition declares war on Sirius Corporation's presence in the Reorte system.
3308-01-24
Reorte Resists Sirius Corporation
The Reorte Mining Coalition challenges Sirius Corporation's presence in the Reorte system.
3305-12-18
Reorte Year’s End Festivities Conclude
End-of-year celebrations conclude successfully in the Reorte system. Independent pilots ensured supplies for over a billion attendees while maintaining security.
3305-12-12
Year’s End Festivities in Reorte
The Alliance hosts end-of-year festivities in the Reorte system, with billions of attendees expected. Prime Minister Mahon calls for community support to supply the celebration.
3305-10-16
Initiative to Eradicate Rockforth Fertiliser
The IAA confirms Rockforth's EX7 fertiliser is linked to the blight. An initiative launches to collect and safely dispose of the contaminated fertiliser from markets across multiple systems.
3301-08-20
Democracy Threatened in Old Worlds
Allegations surfaced that elements within the Pilots Federation are undermining democratic factions in the Old Worlds to push corporate governments into power and strengthen trade agreements with Alioth. The Lave Fortune Organization has become the most influential faction in Lave with independent pilot support. If successful, Lave would become the third system after Leesti and Reorte to have its democratic government overthrown by a corporation. Commentators fear Prime Minister Edmund Mahon is undercutting Alliance principles to protect trade interests. His office has not responded.
3301-05-05
Silver United Succeed at Securing Zaonce
Silver United Solutions deputised 5,535 pilots over a weekend to crush the Zaonce Jet Gang and other pirate crews terrorising the Old Worlds. Inspired by the Alliance Elite Diplomatic Corps' earlier aid to Reorte, the initiative succeeded in driving criminals from Zaonce. To celebrate, Silver United organised a discount on all Faulcon DeLacy ships at Ridley Scott Station, including a limited number of Pythons.
3301-04-26
Reorte Liberated by the Alliance
After three weeks of operations, the Alliance Elite Diplomatic Corps returned control of Reorte to an Alliance-aligned faction. A pirate group had attempted to rename the Lave Cluster the 'New Caribbean', but undercover AEDC agents worked with local groups to prepare for a swift retaking of Davies High. Alliance approval in Reorte now stands at 93%. In Lave, Alliance faction influence exceeds 80%. Attention now turns to Leesti as the next target for Alliance reclamation.
